java.applet/Applet/destroy.name: destroy
java.applet/Applet/destroy.description:
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.Called by the browser or applet viewer to inform this applet that it is
being reclaimed and that it should destroy any resources that it has
allocated.
